title: Default Credentials or Misconfigured Permissions
description: The system may be vulnerable to privilege escalation if default credentials are used, or if user permissions are not properly configured. This could allow an attacker to gain elevated privileges and compromise the entire system.
attack_vector: Exploitation of default credentials, misconfigured user roles, or vulnerabilities in the operating system or application.
mitigations: Implement a robust user role management system with the principle of least privilege.
Regularly review and update user permissions.
